title: Stunt Jump into Military Base
popupHtml:
Stunt Jump into Military Base

Take a sports car and jump over the fence to get into the military base. This gives you some time to get to a helicopter or jet. You will get the four stars after a couple of seconds. *Note:* Not one of the official "Stunt Jump" locations.

title: Hitchhiker - Airport Ride - Tinkle stock option
popupHtml:
Hitchhiker - Airport Ride - Tinkle stock option

This is where you can be lucky and find the guy who wants a ride to the airport. Make it in time and he will give you stock trading tip. Invest in Tinkle (TNK) on BAWSAQ and then later sell them once the peak starts straightening out. *Tip:* don't pick up this guy unless you've finished the game and have the money from the last heist.

title: Patrick "Packie" McReary
popupHtml:
Patrick "Packie" McReary

To unlock Packie McReary to add to your crew for heists, complete the [Getaway Driver](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=309676) event. You will need a vehicle that is able to accommodate all 3 people, plus yourself.

title: Premium Deluxe Motorsport
popupHtml:
Premium Deluxe Motorsport

Premium Deluxe Motorsport is a vehicle dealership located in Los Santos, San Andreas. It is owned by Simeon Yetarian. The garage mostly sells high-cost sports cars and tuned vehicles. Franklin and Lamar are the repo men that take high end vehicles. They got fired eventually, when Lamar steals a bike (Repossession) being repossessed, and when Michael orders Franklin is caught stealing Jimmy's Karin BeeJayXL, in the mission Complications. Premium Deluxe Motorsport is located just west (on the same block) as the Ammu-Nation with range in Pillbox Hill.

title: Cow Farm (Strength Training)
popupHtml:
Cow Farm (Strength Training)

4 Kicks kill a cow, Kill 5 Cows to increase strength 1%. Run from cow to cow to build stamina, but don't bother chasing any of the cows that run away, they respawn pretty fast

title: Redwood Lights Track
popupHtml:
Redwood Lights Track

The Redwood Lights Track is a dirt track for motocross & rallycross. located north of Los Santos in Los Santos County. The site can be reached via the Senora Road and is just south of Harmony and the Blaine County line.

title: Jessie The Hippy (Jesus Christ)
popupHtml:
Jessie The Hippy (Jesus Christ)

You can find Jesse, (Jesus) talking out loud on the pier at Vespucci Beach, at the beginning of the deck with rides. Jesus, or Jesse as his name, goes on to explain some old stories in a hippy-stoner. If you rob him he even leaves $12 dollars, reference to the 12 disciples.

title: Altruist Cult Shootout

Altruist Cult Shootout

**Trevor Only** After delivering four victims to the Altruists, you'll be taken inside and need to fight your way out. Be on the lookout for [four briefcases holding $25,000](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13607) each, and a machine gun to help even the odds.

title: Entrance to Underground Tunnel
popupHtml:
Entrance to Underground Tunnel

Underneath the highway. The Entrance to the Tunnel system leading from this area, through a incomplete Tunnel, past a small clearing by the Union Depository Vault area, through a pair of Pipes and into the Los Santos Metro Tunnels, through an Incomplete station and into the Sewers which leads to the LS Sewers. This tunnel is most notably used in the Jewel Store Job and The Big Score [Obvious] as an Escape Tunnel in the former and the way into the Union Depository Tunnel via a Tunnel Bore into the Vault in the latter.
